overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed IV: Black Flag showing a hooded protagonist exploring a tropical Caribbean shoreline. The character walks away from a burning shipwreck along turquoise waters, traverses rocky outcrops with palm trees, and reaches a promontory overlooking the open ocean.

events.description: character moves away from burning shipwreck along the shoreline, ship begins to exit left side of frame

agents.ego_description: walking away from the burning galleon shipwreck along the sandy shore

entered.detail: large wooden ship engulfed in flames, partially submerged in turquoise water with smoke rising
clear tropical water with visible sandy bottom and gentle waves
sandy shoreline with gentle slope into the water
green forested landmass visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a dramatic view of a burning shipwreck in the turquoise Caribbean waters. The hooded protagonist walks along the sandy beach away from the wreck, with tropical islands visible in the distance under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky tropical shoreline with palm trees and vegetation

events.description: transition from open sandy beach to rocky shoreline with palm trees and coastal vegetation
terrain becomes more rocky and elevated as character climbs onto coastal outcrop

agents.ego_description: traversing the rocky coastline with scattered palm trees and tropical vegetation

entered.detail: tall coconut palms lining the rocky shore with green fronds
gray rocky terrain with patches of grass and coastal plants
driftwood and planks washed ashore from the shipwreck

segments.scene_description: The character moves along a narrower rocky path lined with palm trees and tropical bushes. The burning ship disappears behind as the terrain becomes more rugged, with wooden debris scattered along the shore and the water now visible to the right.

events.description: character stops walking at the cliff edge and begins observing the ocean vista
camera pans around to reveal panoramic view of open ocean and distant islands

agents.ego_description: standing on the rocky promontory looking out at the open ocean and distant sailing vessels

entered.detail: expansive turquoise sea stretching to the horizon with gentle waves
small vessel with sails visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the tip of the rocky promontory and stops to survey the open ocean. The camera pans to reveal a vast seascape with distant islands and sailing ships on the horizon, while the character stands at the edge of the cliff overlooking the turquoise waters.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the immediate chaos of a burning shipwreck to a serene, expansive vista of the open ocean. It begins on a sandy beach where a hooded protagonist walks away from a blazing wreck amidst turquoise Caribbean waters and distant islands. As the character progresses, the terrain shifts from open sand to a narrower, rugged rocky path lined with palm trees and tropical bushes, causing the fire to disappear behind the landscape. The scene then opens up as the character reaches the tip of a rocky promontory, stopping at the cliff's edge. Finally, the camera pans outward to reveal a vast seascape dotted with sailing ships on the horizon under a partly cloudy sky.
